existing_features.title: Replace the current CORS proxy base URL with `https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=` (or equivalent allorigins.win endpoint) in useTabs.ts wherever proxy URLs are generated, so that all proxied tab navigation routes through allorigins.win.

Update any hardcoded proxy references in HomeSearch.tsx and TabContent.tsx to also use allorigins.win, ensuring the proxy status indicator and iframe src construction are consistent with the change in useTabs.ts.

projectName: Switch proxy service back to allorigins.win
